title: Explain Proof-of-Useful-Work
description: Write a clear, concise explanation of the Proof-of-Useful-Work consensus mechanism. Cover: (1) how it differs from PoW and PoS, (2) what makes the 'work' useful, (3) one real-world application. Target audience: a developer who understands blockchain basics. Max 500 words.

eval_config.rubric:
Score 0.0-1.0 based on:
- Accuracy (0.3): correct technical explanation of PoUW vs PoW/PoS
- Clarity (0.3): well-structured, easy to follow for a developer audience
- Completeness (0.2): covers all 3 required topics
- Conciseness (0.2): within 500 words, no fluff
Deduct 0.2 if over 500 words. Return only the numeric score.
